name: gestion-de-tareas
description: Mini Trello - Sistema de gestión de tareas en equipo

scripts.build: npm -w shared run build && npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.test: npm -w backend test && npm -w frontend test
scripts.lint: npm -w backend run lint && npm -w frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm -w backend run lint:fix && npm -w frontend run lint:fix
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w backend run typecheck && npm -w frontend run typecheck
